title: Polynomial, Rational, and Nonlinear Models · Model Lens: Nonlinear Roots
summary: Compare alternative growth and geometry models for a production process. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int nonlinear roots increment in a nonlinear model comparison report. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Find nonlinear roots graphically and numerically and verify them in the original model.
Interpret zeros, holes, asymptotes, and domain restrictions in rational models.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
